title: CSV ↔ Markdown Table
description: Bi-directional live conversion between CSV and Markdown tables: quoted/multiline fields, column alignment, pretty padding (CJK-aware) and transpose. Zero deps, fully local.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Parsing and generation run entirely in your browser — table contents are never uploaded.

placeholder.csv: Paste CSV; quoted fields may contain commas / newlines / "" escapes
placeholder.md: Paste a Markdown table (second line must be the --- separator row)

error.too_few_rows: Need at least a header row plus the separator row.
error.missing_align_row: Second line must be a --- / :--- / ---: separator row.

hint.bidirectional: Edit either side to auto-sync the other; lock direction for one-way only.
